title: Random Enchant Fix
description: Fixes issues with enchant functions in loot tables applying unwanted enchantments.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06751ad27604fd802ee4a4b05c81f88696a9c1a6_0.webp)

This mod allows modpack developers to remove enchantments from being applied with the `minecraft:enchant_with_levels` function. By default, this applies a fix for the [Dungeons and Taverns](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dungeon-and-taverns) datapack, removing some placeholder enchantments only meant to be applied to its custom boss mobs.
